message:
fix(web): Track web database with full data including tropism_predictions

The web public database was missing the tropism_predictions table
(44 rows) required for the TropismOverlay feature. Synced from root
phage.db which now contains all data used in the TUI.

Database contents (all tables now present):
- phages: 12 (Lambda, T4, T7, PhiX174, MS2, M13, P22, Phi29, Mu, Phi6, SPbeta, T5)
- genes: 1948 (annotated CDS, promoters, terminators)
- sequences: 68 (10kb chunks for virtualized rendering)
- codon_usage: 12 (precomputed per-phage statistics)
- models: 0 (3D structure data - future)
- tropism_predictions: 44 (receptor specificity predictions)
- preferences: user settings storage

Also updated .gitignore to:
- Only ignore root /phage.db (build artifact)
- Explicitly track packages/web/public/phage.db for deployment

Updated manifest with new SHA-256 hash for cache invalidation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,8 +22,9 @@ scratch*.ts
 temp*.ts
 debug*.ts
 
-# Generated database
-phage.db
+# Generated database (root level only, web public db is tracked for deployment)
+/phage.db
+!packages/web/public/phage.db
 
 # Logs and coverage
 npm-debug.log*
